Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: The Trork silently brings the palm of his large hand to his face, in the evidently-universal gesture of exasperation.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: At least human not yell like last one.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: If human not buy treasure from Gronk, why climb down so far?

Line.Text: Gronk hurt no-one, but human and running-plants always assume before asking!
